summary: Backend API tests for Quote Creation Simplification passed (13/13). Frontend testing revealed CRITICAL ISSUE: QuotesPage.jsx with SystemItemSelector is NOT wired into routes. Admin /admin/quotes uses QuotesRequestsPage (read-only list). Quote creation from CRM uses QuoteBuilderDrawer which lacks pricing_status/waiting_for_pricing handling.

critical.issue: QuotesPage.jsx with SystemItemSelector is NOT imported or used in App.js routes. The admin /admin/quotes route uses QuotesRequestsPage instead.
critical.details: The new QuotesPage.jsx component with SystemItemSelector exists at /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotesPage.jsx but is not wired into the application routes. Users cannot access the new quote creation UI with catalog search.

critical.issue: QuoteBuilderDrawer (used in CRM for quote creation) does not implement pricing_status or waiting_for_pricing handling
critical.details: The QuoteBuilderDrawer component at /app/frontend/src/components/crm/QuoteBuilderDrawer.jsx is used for creating quotes from leads but lacks the pricing_status field and waiting_for_pricing badge functionality.

integration_issues.issue: No direct 'Create Quote' button on /admin/quotes page - QuotesRequestsPage is read-only

action_items: CRITICAL: Wire QuotesPage.jsx into App.js routes - replace QuotesRequestsPage with QuotesPage at /admin/quotes route OR add a new route for the new quote creation UI
HIGH: Add pricing_status field handling to QuoteBuilderDrawer.jsx for CRM quote creation flow
HIGH: Add 'Waiting for pricing' amber badge to QuoteBuilderDrawer when items have zero price
MEDIUM: Disable 'Create Quote' button in QuoteBuilderDrawer when items have waiting_for_pricing status
critical_code_review_comments: QuotesPage.jsx exists with SystemItemSelector but is NOT used in routes - dead code
App.js line 640: Route path='quotes' uses QuotesRequestsPage, not QuotesPage
QuoteBuilderDrawer.jsx does not track pricing_status field in line items
Backend API correctly supports pricing_status field and waiting_for_pricing status
Backend status transitions (waiting_for_pricing → ready_to_send → sent → approved) work correctly
Quote approval correctly auto-generates Invoice + Order

success_rate.frontend: 0% - QuotesPage with SystemItemSelector not accessible via routes

seed_data_creation: Test quotes created during backend testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for quote creation with pricing_status work correctly. The main issue is frontend routing - QuotesPage.jsx with SystemItemSelector is not wired into App.js. The current /admin/quotes route uses QuotesRequestsPage (read-only list view). Quote creation from CRM uses QuoteBuilderDrawer which lacks pricing_status handling. Main agent needs to: 1) Add QuotesPage to routes, 2) Update QuoteBuilderDrawer with pricing_status support.

backend_api_tests: Product search returns array with required fields - PASSED
POST /api/admin/quotes-v2 with priced items creates draft quote - PASSED
POST /api/admin/quotes-v2 with waiting_for_pricing items creates waiting_for_pricing quote - PASSED
PATCH status transition draft → ready_to_send - PASSED
PATCH status transition ready_to_send → sent - PASSED
PATCH status transition sent → approved auto-generates Invoice + Order - PASSED
PATCH status transition waiting_for_pricing → ready_to_send - PASSED
GET /api/admin/quotes-v2/{id} get quote by ID - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: QuotesPage.jsx with SystemItemSelector NOT accessible via routes - ISSUE FOUND
CRM page quote creation uses QuoteBuilderDrawer - VERIFIED
QuoteBuilderDrawer has product catalog search - VERIFIED
QuoteBuilderDrawer lacks pricing_status handling - ISSUE FOUND

backend_quote_creation_with_pricing_stat.details: Accepts line_items with pricing_status field. Quote status set to waiting_for_pricing when items have that status.

backend_status_transitions.details: All transitions work: draft, waiting_for_pricing, ready_to_send, sent, approved, rejected, expired, converted

backend_quote_approval_auto_generation.details: Quote approval auto-generates Invoice + Order with generated_invoice and generated_order in response

frontend_system_item_selector.details: QuotesPage.jsx with SystemItemSelector exists but is not wired into routes

frontend_waiting_for_pricing_badge.details: QuoteBuilderDrawer does not show amber 'Waiting for pricing' badge for items with zero price

frontend_send_button_disabled.details: Cannot test Send button disabled state since QuotesPage is not accessible

current_admin_quotes_route.issue: Read-only list view, no Create Quote functionality

unused_quotes_page.issue: NOT imported or used in App.js
